sentences.arabic: أَعْتَقِدُ أَنَّ الْمَطَرَ نِعْمَةٌ يَجِبُ أَنْ نَشْكُرَ عَلَيْهَا.
sentences.translation: Smatram da je kiša blagodat za koju trebamo biti zahvalni.
sentences.translationEn: I believe that rain is a blessing we should be grateful for.

sentences.translation: Kiša zaliva usjeve i čisti zrak.
sentences.translationEn: Rain waters the crops and cleans the air.

sentences.arabic: أُحِبُّ أَنْ أَجْلِسَ وَأَسْمَعَ صَوْتَ الْمَطَرِ.
sentences.translation: Volim sjediti i slušati zvuk kiše.
sentences.translationEn: I like to sit and listen to the sound of rain.

sentences.arabic: يَوْمُ الْمَطَرِ يَوْمٌ هَادِئٌ جَمِيلٌ لِلتَّأَمُّلِ.
sentences.translation: Kišni dan je miran i lijep dan za razmišljanje.
sentences.translationEn: A rainy day is a calm beautiful day for reflection.
